chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 425 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 23.01.2023 Mr. Badaruddin Memon, Advocate for the applicant/accused. Mr. Saleem Akhtar Malik, Advocate for the complainant. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Through instant Criminal Bail Application, applicant Muhammad Arshad son of Asghar Ali seeks pre-arrest bail in Crime No.254 of 2022, registered at Police Station Daharki, District Ghotki, under Sections 489-F, 452, 506/2, 504, P.P.C. His earlier application for the same relief being Criminal Bail Application No.1215 of 2022 was heard and dismissed by learned Additional Sessions Judge-II, Ghotki. Applicant was admitted to interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 06.09.2022. Now, the matter is fixed for confirmation of the same or otherwise. At the very outset, learned Counsel for the complainant files statement to the effect that he has no objection for confirmation of the interim pre-arrest bail to the applicant/accused as the parties have resolved their matter outside of the Court. In view of aforementioned statement, learned Additional P.G. also records his no objection for confirmation of the interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicant/accused by this Court. Accordingly, the same is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
